assertionResults.title: Email icon is clickable mailto link
assertionResults.reason: Filtered to folio 3020010390001 and confirmed a contact email link rendered as an anchor element with mailto href.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173
In search box, enter 3020010390001
Inspect first matching row contact cell
Verify email icon is rendered as <a href="mailto:test@example.com">

assertionResults.title: Phone icon is clickable tel link
assertionResults.reason: For the same filtered lead row, the phone icon rendered as an anchor with tel href.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173
Search for 3020010390001
Inspect row contact cell
Verify phone icon is rendered as <a href="tel:(305)871-4174">

assertionResults.title: Mailto contains correct email
assertionResults.reason: Compared the rendered mailto href against leads.json contact.email for folio 3020010390001; values matched exactly.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173 and filter by folio 3020010390001
Capture rendered href for email anchor
Read /leads.json lead contact.email for same folio
Assert href === 'mailto:' + contact.email

assertionResults.title: Tel contains correct phone
assertionResults.reason: Compared rendered tel href against leads.json contact.phone for folio 3020010390001; values matched exactly.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173 and filter by folio 3020010390001
Capture rendered href for phone anchor
Read /leads.json lead contact.phone for same folio
Assert href === 'tel:' + contact.phone

assertionResults.title: Contact icons without data don't render broken links
assertionResults.reason: Filtered to lead with folio 0141110140160 (no contact). Contact cell displayed dash and contained zero anchors, including no empty mailto/tel links.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173
Search for 0141110140160
Inspect contact cell in matching row
Verify dash is shown and there are no <a href^=mailto:> or <a href^=tel:> links

assertionResults.title: Score breakdown popover shows EV factor
assertionResults.reason: Clicked the score badge and verified popover text includes EV entries: 'EV FACTOR' and 'Expected Value (EV $12,450)'.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173
Search for folio 3020010390001
Click score badge (100)
Verify ScoreBreakdown popover contains EV/Expected Value factor text

popoverText: Computed EV = P(settled) × avg_settlement × fee_rate = $12,450; log-compressed to 8.5 pts

frictions.description: agent-browser network log initially showed no captured requests until a page reload occurred.
frictions.resolution: Reloaded the page in the same session and re-ran network capture; leads.json fetches were then visible.

summary: Validated 6 assigned dashboard assertions via agent-browser session 4a554638eca0__g4. All 6 passed with screenshot + DOM evidence, no console errors observed, and local leads.json/network responses were 200.
